title: Mixed documents in, stable chunks out
description: A single ingestion surface for Office documents, Markdown, and PDFs. Normalize once, then feed the same output into search, RAG, and review workflows.
steps: Extract text, headings, and metadata from mixed document folders.
Chunk with deterministic settings so re-runs keep stable citations.
Ship normalized results into vector stores, indexes, or audit workflows.

artifacts.name: proposal.docx
artifacts.detail: Title, author, headings, page count, and normalized body text ready for chunking.

artifacts.name: proposal-014.json
artifacts.detail: Overlap preserves context while source references stay stable across repeated indexing runs.

artifacts.name: search-batch
artifacts.detail: Use the same extracted payload for semantic search, compliance review, or retrieval-augmented generation.

title: Build stakeholder slides from live data
description: Turn release metrics, customer summaries, and reporting snapshots into repeatable presentations that stay aligned with your source data.
steps: Start from a stable deck structure instead of hand-editing every presentation.
Populate titles, bullets, tables, and charts from the same domain data used in reports.
Export polished .pptx decks for customer reviews, weekly updates, or release briefings.

artifacts.name: Weekly Status
artifacts.summary: Consistent opener with branding and timeframe
artifacts.detail: Keeps recurring updates recognizable while still being generated from code.

artifacts.name: Revenue by Quarter
artifacts.detail: Render the same metrics you use in Excel or dashboards without manual chart editing.

artifacts.name: Presenter cues
artifacts.summary: Context for demos and QBR narration
artifacts.detail: Ship the talking points with the deck so the generated output is useful beyond screenshots.

title: From topology metadata to .vsdx artifacts
description: Use inventory, workflow, or ownership data to emit diagrams that stay in sync with the systems they describe instead of drifting as hand-drawn files.
steps: Map systems, services, or workflow steps to stable shapes and color rules.
Connect entities to show traffic, dependency, or approval flow.
Ship the diagram alongside Word reports or PowerPoint decks generated from the same source data.

artifacts.name: App Server
artifacts.summary: Typed shape with layout and styling
artifacts.detail: Keep labels, colors, and placement consistent so regenerated diagrams are easy to compare.

artifacts.name: HTTPS / TCP
artifacts.detail: Use connectors to explain how systems interact without hard-coding every visual edge by hand.

artifacts.name: System Overview
artifacts.detail: Generate separate topology, deployment, and ownership views in the same VSDX package.
